title: Lammy told JD Vance his remarks about Henry Nowak were ‘wrong’ – UK politics live
summary_full: The justice secretary said he spoke to the US vice president after he blamed mass immigration for Nowak’s murderReform UK’s home affairs spokesperson Zia Yusuf said that UK police are “institutionally racist”, claiming that there is “structural anti-white prejudice”.When asked by Laura Kuenssberg if he thinks the police are institutionally racist, he said: “I think the correct answer to that has to be yes given literally on their website it tells people not to treat people the same – to not be colour-blind.” Continue reading...
